pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies: 'Create a new page in WordPress named "Terms of Service"'

pi_items.metadata_value: By placing an order, you agree to our standard terms of service
pi_items.verified_value: By placing an order, you agree to our standard terms of service
pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies full content: 'By placing an order, you agree to our standard terms of service regarding shipping, returns, and privacy.' The metadata snippet is a substring of this required content, correctly used for partial matching in verifier.py
WooCommerce code reference (https://gist.github.com/Bradley-D/7287723) confirms this is the correct wp_options database option name for storing the terms and conditions page ID

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a WordPress page titled 'Terms of Service' with content 'By placing an order, you agree to our standard terms of service regarding shipping, returns, and privacy.' and configuring WooCommerce to use this page by setting the 'woocommerce_terms_page_id' option in the wp_options database table. All metadata claims are verified against official WooCommerce documentation and the task description.
